summary.ms: Ruang glosari telah disediakan untuk menerima senarai istilah dan definisi kemudian.
summary.en: The glossary space is ready to receive terms and definitions later.

notes.ms: Struktur ini memudahkan kita menambah istilah satu demi satu selepas ini.
notes.en: This structure makes it easy for us to add terms one by one later.

notes.ms: Pengalaman pengguna sudah konsisten antara senarai sura dan bahan rujukan.
notes.en: The user experience is already consistent between the sura list and the study material.
